title: OnOptions
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Trump Ousts Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem, Taps Businessman-Turned-Senator as Replacement
items.description: Noem has faced intense criticism this week for her recent congressional testimony.

items.description: The retailer is trying to beat out Amazon and Walmart with a major investment in retail.

items.title: How Markwayne Mullin Became the Most Influential Business Owner in Trump’s Washington
items.description: The Oklahoma entrepreneur ran for Congress as an outsider challenging the system. Now tapped to run DHS, he’s become the ultimate insider.

items.title: SpaceX is poised to raise more money in its IPO than was raised in last year’s 90 IPOs combined
items.description: And that means Wall Street will make more money, too.

items.title: Korean startup Wrtn is on track to pass $100M in annual recurring revenue, riding a loneliness-epidemic-fueled boom in AI entertainment
items.description: Chief product officer Dong-jae Lee uses the analogy of a dungeon master for a tabletop RPG: The AI constructs a narrative in response to user choices.

items.title: Silicon Valley legend Vinod Khosla has ‘no plans to leave California’ amid billionaire tax uproar—but he has another idea to fix the wealth loophole
items.description: Imagine a world where taxes just "go away" for everyone making less than $100,000 a year, Khosla told Fortune.

items.title: Brands Keep ‘Killing’ Their Mascots. Mr. Clean’s Viral Retirement Shows Why the Tactic Works
items.description: The buzzy stunt shows why mascot drama is having a moment.
